summary: W1475 refines the W1474 W987 construction by replacing the map strict-preimage data family with six map-level fields: zero and one source-map families, zero and one localization factorization laws, and left and right naturality laws. It reconstructs the map strict-preimage data family, feeds the resulting W1474 input, and lets W1474/W1473/W1472 reconstruct the object strict-preimage data, raw lift blueprint, and normalized lift blueprint while reassembling W519, W973, W945, W730, W986, and W987. Product success remains false because no positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness exists and the final imported original four-task completion surface still proves productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the four original tasks.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; W1475 reconstructs the W987 route from fifty-six assumed inputs, including raw boundary fields, raw relation fields, target-difference surjectivity and target-codomain compact no-univ membership primitive families, three W714 selected-difference closed-embedding diagram component fields, a raw mapped explicit cokernel closed-embedding field, eight normalized-lift object strict-preimage fields, six normalized-lift map strict-preimage fields, normalized-lift map identity and composition laws for the lift blueprint, fixed-target uniqueness, source-triangulation fields, endpoint kernel/cokernel-top fields, localized right-adjoint object and morphism maps plus identity and composition laws, localized adjunction unit/counit component and naturality fields, localized adjunction left/right triangle component identity fields, unit-mapping-cone kernel/cokernel-top fields, and unit-mapping-cone iso hom/inv/identity fields rather than proving those inputs from a positive product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.
